basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indian School of Mines Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indian School of Mines Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) ANRF Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 13-05-2026 on the official website of IIT ISM Dhanbad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 28 years of age who have M.Tech. in Water Resources Engineering/ Hydraulic Engineering/ Hydrology/ Environment Engineering/ Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Civil Engineering/ Earth Sciences or equivalent specializations with GATE/NET qualification are eligible

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidate as per GoI rule.

qualification.details: M.Tech. in Water Resources Engineering/ Hydraulic Engineering/ Hydrology/Environment Engineering/ Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Civil Engineering/ Earth Sciences or equivalent specializations. Candidate must be GATE/NET qualified. B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Agricultural Engineering & Technology. Note: Candidates awaiting their M.Tech. degree results are eligible to apply.

salary_details.details: ₹ 37000/- p.m. + 20% HRA for first two years; ₹ 42000 /- p.m.+ 20% HRA for third year

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22nd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed M.Tech. in relevant fields such as Water Resources Engineering, Hydraulic Engineering, Hydrology, Environment Engineering, Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & GIS, Civil Engineering, or Earth Sciences. A B.Tech. in Civil Engineering or Agricultural Engineering & Technology is also required, along with GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is ₹ 37000/- per month plus 20% HRA for the first two years, and ₹ 42000/- per month plus 20% HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by sending their complete application along with all necessary documents via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST, Women) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates awaiting their M.Tech. results apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who are awaiting their M.Tech. degree results are eligible to apply for this position.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Indian School of Mines Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this ANRF Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.
